name: Johnny Trigger 3D Online
description: In this interesting 3D shooting game Johnny Trigger 3D Online, you only need one hand to control the character. In the process of adventure, you can use the guns and weapons in your hand to shoot and fight the enemy accurately. It's better to shoot the enemy with only one bullet, so you can save more bullets and defeat more enemies. Have fun!
instructions: Mouse click or tap the screen to play
tags: Action, Boys, Gun, H5, HTML, HTML5, Kids, Killing, Shoot 'Em Up, Shooting, Stickman
